title: 4 Slot Coin Operated Cola Vending Machine
description: 4-lane coin-operated cola can vending machine accepting ₹5/₹10 coins, with solenoid-actuated spiral dispensers per lane, LCD display, Arduino Mega controller, and MQTT sales logging.
objective: 4 product lanes; accept ₹5/₹10 coins; ≤ 3 s dispense; LCD item display; MQTT sales log; OTA firmware update.
constraints: 12 V DC; Arduino Mega + ESP32 co-processor; BOM < ₹8000; RS232 coin validator.
design_element_titles: Coin Acceptor + Solenoid Dispenser Vending Mechanism

element_usage_notes.Coin Acceptor + Solenoid Dispenser Vendi: CH-926 coin acceptor; 4× solenoid spiral dispensers; UART coin validation.
element_usage_notes.Arduino Mega 2560 MCU Platform: Controls 4 dispense solenoids and LCD; ESP32 co-processor handles WiFi/MQTT.
